---
title: "Recently Read"
date: 2026-03-21
categories:
  - Automated Updates
  - Books
draft: false
---

![](https://i.gr-assets.com/images/S/compressed.photo.goodreads.com/books/1624658259l/58425375._SX98_.jpg){width=150px}

## Moral Aspects of City Life: A Series of Lectures
**E.H. Chapin**

Rating: ★★★★☆

<br/>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*This post was automatically generated from [my Goodreads shelf](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/98547221-connor-hanan?shelf=read).*

-CH
